caption: Joe Biden is shown from the chest up, wearing a dark blue suit, a white shirt, and a blue-and-white striped tie. He is positioned in front of a background depicting the White House's North Portico under a blue sky with fluffy white clouds. A small American flag flies atop the building, and a water fountain is visible in the foreground lawn. Biden is speaking, and his facial expression and mouth position shift slightly across the sequence. He is wearing a small, black lapel microphone. The background remains static throughout the clip, while Biden's head movements are minimal as he addresses an unseen audience. There is no on-screen text or logos visible in any of the frames.
